states.name: draft
states.description: Artifact role is being assembled and is not yet durably promoted.
entry_requirements: Exact candidate Object Revisions and purpose are recorded.

states.name: promoted
states.description: Artifact role is durably promoted over exact Object Revisions with production Receipts.
entry_requirements: Promotion Receipt and retained Object Revisions exist.

states.name: superseded
states.description: A newer Artifact is preferred while this Artifact, releases and proof remain retained.
entry_requirements: Replacement Artifact and reason are recorded.

states.name: tombstoned
states.description: Artifact is logically withdrawn under retention policy; immutable releases/proof remain historical records.
entry_requirements: Tombstone authority and retention are recorded.

required_preconditions: Purpose, subject and candidate Object Revisions are known.
Exact Object Revisions and production correlation are retained; promotion policy passes.
Replacement Artifact and retained release/proof relationships are recorded.
Retention/legal-hold analysis is complete; physical deletion remains separate.
